mapper.select: select m.*, u.user_name, c.title from message m left join user u on m.user_id = u.user_id left join competition c on m.competition_id = c.competition_id where m.user_id = #{userId} and m.is_read = #{isRead} order by m.message_created_time DESC

select user_id as userId, user_name from user u where user_id in
#{id}
